name: Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Enriches marketing-qualified leads at the moment of handoff by checking Backstory for existing engagement history. Native-first Workato blueprint that favors recipe functions, custom connectors, and native delivery/connectivity surfaces over raw HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Backstory custom connector built with the Connector SDK
Salesforce, HubSpot, or Dynamics connector for CRM reads and writes
Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery
Meeting-system connector or approved custom connector for transcript intake
Lookup tables, data tables, or project properties for routing and canonical maps
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or ad hoc API request actions for Slack, CRM, calendar, or email delivery
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties comments, or recipe notes
No agent output sent straight to transport or records without JSON schema validation
No routing, dedupe, or retry logic hidden inside opaque code snippets when Recipe Functions or data tables can own it

trigger_model.source: Webhook — New MQL created in CRM/MAP                 |
trigger_model.recommended_surface: Native CRM event trigger or API Platform endpoint

connectors: Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize the Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer trigger into the shared run_context contract.
Load and normalize the primary Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer business inputs into source_record objects.
Join the intermediate context needed for Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer, especially source inputs.
Render normalized delivery_payload objects for Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer.
Capture deterministic summary, dedupe, and retry state for Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer.

main_recipes.trigger: Native CRM event trigger or API Platform endpoint
steps: Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for Enrich with Backstory History
Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for AI Handoff Scoring
Use Slack connector for Deliver to SDR/AE
Record deterministic run summary and retry state

enrich_with_backstory_history.intent: Queries Backstory for any existing engagement with the MQL's account: past meetings, email history, known contacts, prior opportunities.

ai_handoff_scoring.intent: AI Agent evaluates the engagement history to score the handoff (hot / warm / cold) and generates a context brief with key talking points and relationship history.

deployment_notes: Store connector configuration, defaults, and destination IDs in connection objects or project properties.
Expose Backstory through a reusable custom connector instead of repeated HTTP actions.
Use lookup tables or data tables for routing maps, dedupe keys, and canonical mappings.
Split fan-out delivery into deterministic recipe-function stages so Slack, Teams, and email stay independently testable.
Keep synthesis agentic, but keep delivery and persistence deterministic.
